creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This is a known issue but a fix will require a bit of work. I'm not sure 
we want to special case this port in upgrade-site-packages as it sets a 
precedent that is difficult to maintain. One solution may be to grep through 
/var/db/pkg looking for things that require python. Another solution is to fix 
the mailman script to not use python2.6 in it's shebang line.
